title: cleome obtusa var. gamboensis
intro: Cleome obtusa var. gamboensis, a plant species also known as a type of cleome or spider flower, is a tropical plant native to certain regions. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cleome obtusa var. gamboensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal benefits.
